name: Cinetreak Cinelive V1 HDMI FHD Live-Streaming Switcher
description: Mix and live stream video in either a standard horizontal or a social media-friendly vertical orientation using the CineLive V1 4-Channel HDMI Video Switcher from CineTreak.

features.Key Features:: 4 x HDMI Inputs, up to 1080p60 Video | HDMI Program & Preview Outputs | Vertical & Horizontal Streaming | Multi RTMP Livestreaming via USB-C & LAN | Vertical & Horizontal Preview/Multiview | Luma & Chromakey, LOGO, PiP and PoP | H.264 Encoding with 2-Ch Audio | VISCA Control for up to 4 x PTZ Cameras | USB-A Recording | 2 x 3.5mm Mic/Line Audio Inputs
features.What’s in the box?: CineTreak CineLive V1 4-Channel HDMI Video Switcher with Vertical Live Streaming | 12 VDC, 2A Power Adapter | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
